bio: I'm Gaurav Kumar, an ML Engineer and M.Tech (AI/ML) student at Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies, Faridabad. My research sits at the intersection of adversarial robustness, uncertainty estimation, and computer vision — building ML pipelines that are reliable and interpretable in production settings.

I've authored 3 peer-reviewed publications in IEEE and IJRASET venues, and a book chapter published by Taylor & Francis. I've contributed to open-source projects through the Ubuntu LoCo Team and GirlScript Summer of Code.
I'm actively looking for research collaborations and ML engineering internships where I can work on production-grade systems. The best way to reach me is by email.

education.org: Manav Rachna International Institute of Research and Studies

experience.note: Resolved system-level bugs and hardware compatibility issues; contributed patches and documentation across Ubuntu releases. (Remote)
Implemented feature modules for an open-source audio processing project; reviewed peer pull requests under mentorship. (Remote)
